---

title: "D04_01: Poisson Time Label Enrichment (CBZ)"
subtitle: "Add hierarchical time labels to Poisson analysis outputs"
parent: "D04_poisson_marketing"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D04_01"
date-created: "2025-12-14"
date-modified: "2025-12-30"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on:
  - "D04_02_poisson_analysis"
outputs_to:
  - "app_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_all"
implements:
  - script: "cbz_D04_01.R"
    path: "update_scripts/DRV/cbz/"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D04_01: Poisson Time Label Enrichment (CBZ) {#overview}

This task enriches `df_cbz_poisson_analysis_all` with hierarchical time labels
(year, month, weekday) derived from raw order dates. It is a CBZ-only
post-processing step for UI-friendly labeling and does not create visualization
artifacts.

## Implementation Scripts

| Platform | Script | Location | Output |
|----------|--------|----------|--------|
| Cyberbiz | `cbz_D04_01.R` | `update_scripts/DRV/cbz/` | `app_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_all` |

## Task Definition (NSQL)

```nsql
ENRICH app_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_all
WITH time_labels FROM raw_data.df_cbz_orders___raw
OUTPUT TO app_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_all
```

## Inputs

- `app_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_all` (existing Poisson analysis results)
- `raw_data.df_cbz_orders___raw` (date context for year/month ranges)

## Outputs

- `app_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_all` (overwritten with time labels)
- `app_data.df_cbz_poisson_analysis_all_backup_YYYYMMDD` (backup table)

## Notes

- CBZ-only; no eBay or cross-platform implementation.
- Visualization is handled in app modules; this step only adds labels.
- Execution order: this step runs **after** D04_02 outputs exist.

## Next Task

Proceed to [D04_03: R120 Metadata Enrichment](D04_03_r120_metadata.qmd) if
metadata enrichment is required.
